title: Executive Order 5868—Reservoir-Site Restoration No. 11, California
text:
So much of the order of June 8, 1926, creating Reservoir-Site Reserve No. 17, as affects the lands hereinafter described is hereby revoked:
Mount Diablo Meridian
T. 2 S., R. 15 E., sec. 20, S. ½ SW. ¼, SW. ¼ SE. ¼;
sec. 29, NW. ¼ NE ¼;
sec. 30, N. ½ NE. ¼ SE. ¼ NE. ¼.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
June 28, 1932.
